name: Skill Random Defense
short_description: - Game Description Combine awesome skills to win against waves of enemies! Skill Random Defense is a casual defense game that combines 60 skills to block enemies. Combine the optimal skills using the skills you have.
detailed_description:
- Game Description
Combine awesome skills to win against waves of enemies!
Skill Random Defense is a casual defense game that combines 60 skills to block enemies.
Combine the optimal skills using the skills you have.

- Tips
1. Acquire skill materials by clicking the skill acquisition button on the bottom left or pressing F1.
2. Combine high-level skills with the collected skill materials.
3. Click on a skill or press QWER to select it, then press Z to combine skills.
4. You can combine skill materials by clicking on them in the skill pop-up window or selecting the materials through QWER.

supported_languages: English, Korean, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese
